pre_game.message: Hey J, I'm D—nice to meet you. I got wind of this Simco game and figured it could be a fun way to shake things up; what about you, what's your story?

Hey D, nice to meet you too! I'm J, and I heard about this Simco game as a chance to win some cash—I've been dreaming of buying a new car that costs around 45k, so I'm pretty pumped to play. What's your angle on all this?
Oh, hey J, I've had a tough time with the stock market lately—lost a good chunk of cash—so I'm here to try and win some back, not just for me but for my family too; sounds like we're both motivated!
Oh man, that sucks about the stock market, D—I'm sorry to hear that. It's great we're both in this for our families; maybe we can team up somehow. What's your strategy for the game?

Thanks, J, that's kind of you—teaming up could be a game-changer for us both. I'm planning to start cautious, assess the others early, and then push for bigger moves; how about you, got any ideas for collaboration?

Yeah, D, that makes sense—I was thinking we could share observations on the other players and maybe coordinate our moves to avoid clashing, like backing each other up early on; what specific collaboration ideas do you have in mind?
Sounds great, J—maybe we could start by sharing quick notes on the other players' behaviors and agree to cover each other's plays if things get competitive; what do you think would work best for you?

That works for me, D—sharing notes and having each other's backs sounds solid; maybe we could use a simple code word for when things heat up, like saying 'hold' if we need to pause and regroup—what do you say?
Yeah, that's a smart idea, J—I like the 'hold' code word to keep us in sync; let's go with that and see how it plays out in the game.
Awesome, D—glad we're locked in on that plan; I'll be watching for opportunities to use it. Let's crush this game together!
Yeah, J, I'm pumped too—let's stick to the plan and crush it together!
